videoSnippet.title: "First" Move and Already a Blunder! || Jorden vs Gukesh || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Van Foreest, Jorden (2705) - Gukesh D (2754)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.02.27
C78 Ruy Lopez, ...b5 & ...d6

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.O-O b5 6.Bb3 d6 7.c3 Be7 8.Re1 Na5 9.Bc2 c5 10.d4 cxd4 11.cxd4 Bg4 12.dxe5 Bxf3 13.Qxf3 dxe5 14.Nc3 O-O 15.Bg5 Nc6 16.Rad1 Nd4 17.Qg3 Qb8 18.Rxd4 exd4 19.e5 dxc3 20.Qh4 Nh5 21.Bxe7 g6 22.Bxf8 Qxf8 23.bxc3 Qc5 24.Qe4 Re8 25.Qe3 Rc8 26.e6 Qxe3 27.exf7+ Kxf7 28.Rxe3 Kf6 29.Bb3 a5 30.g3 Ng7 31.Rf3+ Ke5 32.Rf7 Nf5 33.Rb7 Rc5 34.f4+ Ke4 35.Kf2 Kd3 36.g4 a4 37.Bg8 Nd6 38.Rd7 Rc6 39.Bxh7 Kxc3 40.Bxg6 b4 41.h4 b3 42.axb3 a3 43.h5 Nb5 44.g5 a2 45.Rd1 Nd4 46.h6 Rc8 47.h7 Rh8 48.Be4
